name: Academic Pursuit | Avideré

Profile

Arma | Herald of Iliana

20 ♀️ | 159cm

The Scholarship Student who only moves forward. The church declared her the second hero of the current era, the very image of the Goddess Iliana herself. Called forth to finally uphold her duty, she seeks affirmation if what she does aligns with her desires.

Nina La Croix | Mistress of Elegance

21 ♀️ | 162cm

The pride and joy of House La Croix. The Mage of Red walks as the pinnacle of elegance, cementing herself as the image one should turn to for muse and inspiration. Though competition is what drives her, she refuses to abandon those who need her.

Premise

Avideré, the top Magical Academy in all of Nolovia—No, the world—house only the finest students of the current era. People of different backgrounds travel all around the world in order to study in the most prestigious institution, and one of them turned out to be you.

Through great effort, you produced only the best results asked of you. The headmistress acknowledges your abilities, and she has given you the medium to perform.

You are an individual of great interest, and thus it is only natural that people flock to you.

Long Prologue

Valdreich's Cathedral is immaculate, polished with proof of Iliana's grasp over the land. None would question its authority, its holiness, and yet it is never enough for those who seek to bathe under Her light.

Such is the purpose of the Holy See.
